description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Validate Website that runs on every push to the main branch, on pull requests to the main branch, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have three jobs: build, build_next, and typecheck. The build job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the code, sets up the website, and runs yarn build in the website directory. The build_next job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up JavaScript, restores emsdk, and runs yarn build in the website-next directory. The typecheck job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up JavaScript, and runs yarn tsc in the website-next directory.
